headerTitle: AI Automation Engineer  ·  LLM Workflow Integration  ·  Business AI Programs  ·  Real Estate Data
subjectText: AI Automation Engineer — ATTOM Data Solutions (Remote) · $150K–$170K
intro: ATTOM is hiring its first AI Automation Engineer to move from ad-hoc experimentation to a structured org-wide program. That is the exact build I have run six times: embed with the team, map workflows, identify where AI integrates meaningfully, ship production automations, drive adoption.
bullets: Org-wide AI program design — six complete FDE engagements across eight industries: mapped department workflows, identified automation opportunities, coordinated pilots, tracked value metrics, documented handoffs. Each team running independently by close.

Real estate data domain already live — built a TCAD appraisal district batch prospecting pipeline pulling owner names, property types, and bbox records across 1.4M+ parcels into outreach campaigns. ATTOM’s territory is not new to this stack.

LLM workflow automation in production — 14 live AI endpoints with multi-model routing (Claude Haiku/Sonnet/Opus + GPT-4o), structured JSON output, HITL confirm-before-execute, and automation patterns equivalent to n8n/Make/Zapier across 13 platforms.
matchNotes: First AI Automation Engineer hire — greenfield program values execution over pedigree. Real estate data domain is a direct portfolio match (TCAD pipeline). LLM production + GM business fluency = exact dual profile. TX-based remote = eligible state.
